title: cyperus lundellii
intro: Cyperus lundellii, also known as Lundell's sedge, is a type of perennial plant in the sedge family (Cyperaceae). The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cyperus lundellii include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory problems, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions and wounds. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, with the herbal preparations often used to treat a range of ailments, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
